mapper.select:
SELECT TBT.ID, TBT.TRUST_NO, TBT.TRUST_TYPE, TBT.CONTRACT_ID, TBT.CUSTOMER_ID, TBT.CUSTOMER_NAME, TBT.PROCESS_CODE, TBT.PROCESS_NAME, TBT.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, TBT.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, TBT.TRADE_TYPE, TBT.PLAN_QUANTITY, TBT.PLAN_TON, TBT.REMARK, TBT.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TBT.SHIP_NAME, TBT.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, TBT.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, TBT.CHECK_TON, TBT.CHECK_NUMBER, TBT.COMPANY_ID, TBT.COMPANY_NAME, TBT.STATUS, TBT.CREATE_BY, TBT.CREATE_BY_NAME, TBT.CREATE_TIME, TBT.UPDATE_BY, TBT.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TBT.UPDATE_TIME, TBT.RELEASE_BY, TBT.RELEASE_BY_NAME, TBT.RELEASE_TIME, TBT.CHECK_BY, TBT.CHECK_BY_NAME, TBT.CHECK_TIME, TBT.EXAMINE_BY, TBT.EXAMINE_BY_NAME, TBT.EXAMINE_TIME, TBT.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, TBT.CARGO_AGENT_NAME, TBT.CARGO_NAME, TBT.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TBT.IMP_EXP, TBT.WORK_ACCOMPANYING_ID, CASE WHEN ( SELECT COUNT( * ) FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST TBH WHERE TBT.ID = TBH.TRUST_ID ) > 0 THEN '1' ELSE '0' END IS_HAVE_HANDOVERLIST, CASE WHEN ( SELECT COUNT( * ) FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST TBH WHERE TBT.ID = TBH.TRUST_ID ) > 0 THEN '已生成' ELSE '未生成' END IS_HAVE_HANDOVERLIST_LABEL, (SELECT regexp_replace((LISTAGG(TO_CHAR(BCI.CARGO_INFO_NO), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY BCI.CARGO_INFO_NO) ),'([^,]+)(,\1)+', '\1') FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO BTC INNER JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO BCI ON BTC.CARGO_INFO_ID = BCI.ID WHERE BTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID) AS CARGO_INFO_NO, (SELECT regexp_replace((LISTAGG(TO_CHAR(BCI.CARGO_OWNER_NAME), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY BCI.CARGO_OWNER_NAME)),'([^,]+)(,\1)+', '\1') FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO BTC INNER JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO BCI ON BTC.CARGO_INFO_ID = BCI.ID WHERE BTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID) AS CARGO_OWNER_NAMES, (SELECT regexp_replace((LISTAGG(TO_CHAR(BCI.CARGO_NAME), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY BCI.CARGO_NAME)),'([^,]+)(,\1)+', '\1') FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO BTC INNER JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO BCI ON BTC.CARGO_INFO_ID = BCI.ID WHERE BTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID) AS CARGO_NAMES FROM T_BUS_TRUST TBT WHERE STATUS NOT IN ('10', '20') AND TRUST_TYPE = '2' AND TBT.TYPE = '陆销'
AND TRUST_NO LIKE #{trustNoLike, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND ID IN ( SELECT BTC2.TRUST_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO BTC2 INNER JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO BCI2 ON BTC2.CARGO_INFO_ID = BCI2.ID WHERE BCI2.CARGO_NAME LIKE #{cargoNameLike, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
AND ID IN ( SELECT BTC2.TRUST_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO BTC2 INNER JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO BCI2 ON BTC2.CARGO_INFO_ID = BCI2.ID WHERE BCI2.CARGO_INFO_NO LIKE #{cargoInfoNoLike, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
AND ID IN ( SELECT BTC2.TRUST_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO BTC2 INNER JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO BCI2 ON BTC2.CARGO_INFO_ID = BCI2.ID WHERE BCI2.CARGO_OWNER_ID = #{cargoOwnerId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
ORDER BY CREATE_TIME DESC

SELECT SUM(A1.TON) FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST A1 LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO A2 ON A1.CARGO_INFO_ID = A2.ID where A1.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipvoyageItemId, jdbcType=BIGINT} group by A1.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID
mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO SYS_FILE_BUSINESS(BUSINESS_ID, FILE_ID) VALUES (#{entity.businessId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.fileId, jdbcType=BIGINT})
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL

INSERT ALL
INTO T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST(ID, TYPE, CARGO_INFO_ID, TRUST_ID, TRUST_CARGO_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SHIP_NAME, VOYAGE, TRADE_TYPE, LOAD_UNLOAD, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_ID, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, QUANTITY, TON, TICKET_NUM,VOLUME_TON, STATEMENT_STATUS_CODE, STATEMENT_STATUS_NAME, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME,DELIVERY_NUMBERS) VALUES (#{entity.id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.cargoInfoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.trustId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.trustCargoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.shipvoyageId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.shipvoyageItemId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.shipName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.voyage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.tradeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{entity.loadUnload, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.cargoOwnerId, jdbcType=BIGINT},#{entity.cargoOwnerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.cargoAgentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.cargoAgentName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.cargoCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.cargoName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.quantity, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{entity.ton, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.ticketNum, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{entity.volumeTon, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.statementStatusCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.statementStatusName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{entity.updateBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.updateByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{entity.deliveryNumbers, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
mapper.select: SELECT SUM (QUANTITY) "quantity", SUM (TON) "ton" FROM T_YARD_TALLY_ITEM WHERE TALLY_ID IN ( SELECT A1. ID FROM T_YARD_TALLY A1 LEFT JOIN M_WORK_PROCESS A2 ON A2.PROCESS_CD = A1.PROCESS_CODE WHERE SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND ( A2.TARGET_CD = '01' OR A2.SOURCE_CD = '01' ) AND A1.DEL_FLAG = 0 ) AND CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT A1.ID, A1.TYPE, A1.CARGO_INFO_ID, A1.TRUST_ID, A1.TRUST_CARGO_ID, A1.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, A1.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, A1.SHIP_NAME, A1.VOYAGE, A1.TRADE_TYPE, A1.LOAD_UNLOAD, A1.CARGO_OWNER_ID, A1.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, A1.CARGO_AGENT_ID, A1.CARGO_AGENT_NAME, A1.CARGO_CODE, A1.CARGO_NAME, A1.QUANTITY, A1.TON, A1.VOLUME_TON, A1.TICKET_NUM, A1.STATEMENT_STATUS_CODE, A1.STATEMENT_STATUS_NAME, A1.REMARK, A1.CREATE_BY, A1.CREATE_BY_NAME, A1.CREATE_TIME, A1.UPDATE_BY, A1.UPDATE_BY_NAME, A1.UPDATE_TIME FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST A1
ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT A1.ID, A1.TYPE, A1.CARGO_INFO_ID, A1.TRUST_ID, A1.TRUST_CARGO_ID, A1.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, A1.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, A1.SHIP_NAME, A1.VOYAGE, A1.TRADE_TYPE, A1.LOAD_UNLOAD, A1.CARGO_OWNER_ID, A1.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, A1.CARGO_AGENT_ID, A1.CARGO_AGENT_NAME, A1.CARGO_CODE, A1.CARGO_NAME, A1.QUANTITY, A1.TON, A1.VOLUME_TON, A1.TICKET_NUM, A1.STATEMENT_STATUS_CODE, A1.STATEMENT_STATUS_NAME, A1.REMARK, A1.CREATE_BY, A1.CREATE_BY_NAME, A1.CREATE_TIME, A1.UPDATE_BY, A1.UPDATE_BY_NAME, A1.UPDATE_TIME FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST A1 WHERE SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT COUNT("TYPE") from T_BUS_TRUST TBT LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC ON TBTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI ON TBCI.ID = TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID WHERE TYPE = '疏港' AND TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO = #{cargoInfoNo}
SELECT SFB.FILE_ID FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI LEFT JOIN SYS_FILE_BUSINESS SFB ON TDSI.ID = SFB.BUSINESS_ID WHERE SFB.BUSINESS_ID = #{shipvoyageItemId}

select sum(WEIGHT_GOODS) WEIGHT_GOODS from (SELECT TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID CARGO_INFO_ID, VWI.WEIGHT_GOODS WEIGHT_GOODS FROM (SELECT TBTC.BUSINESS_NO, TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID AND TBT.TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港')) TEMP JOIN V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI ON VWI.IS_OLD = '否' AND TEMP.BUSINESS_NO = VWI.PLAN_NO UNION ALL SELECT TO_NUMBER(VWI2.CARGO_INFO_ID) CARGO_INFO_ID, VWI2.WEIGHT_GOODS WEIGHT_GOODS FROM V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI2 WHERE VWI2.IS_OLD = '是' AND VWI2.PLAN_TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港') ) where CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT sum(WEIGHT_GOODS) WEIGHT_GOODS FROM (SELECT TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID,VWI.WEIGHT_GOODS FROM (SELECT TBTC.BUSINESS_NO, TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID AND TBT.TYPE = '陆销') TEMP JOIN V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI ON VWI.IS_OLD = '否' AND TEMP.BUSINESS_NO = VWI.PLAN_NO UNION ALL SELECT TO_NUMBER(VWI2.CARGO_INFO_ID), VWI2.WEIGHT_GOODS FROM V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI2 WHERE VWI2.IS_OLD = '是' AND VWI2.PLAN_TYPE = '陆销' ) where CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
select ID from T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO where CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and TRUST_ID = #{trustId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
